program_en: B.Sc. in Exercise Science and Health Education
program_chi: 運動科學與健康教育理學士

groups_outline.title: Students who have completed 3 units of Core Skills Courses will

structure.note: Students who have completed 3 units of Core Skills Courses will be eligible to apply for exemption of 1 unit of University Core Physical Education Requirement. Students are required to apply for the exemption. When exemption from a particular course is recognized, students can only be exempted from the course but not the units. | Capstone courses
